introduce:
This website is my first step to shine like a star.
Not just receiving light, but giving it.
aboutTitle: Hi, I'm syan aspiring to be a developer!
aboutText:
This is my first personal project.
Before military service, I wanted to try something meaningful.
recordText:
I was interested in programming since middle school.
I entered college and studied C and Java.
Then decided to create this website before joining the army.

2.text: I learned C and became interested in embedded systems.

3.text: I started learning HTML and Java and got into web and app development.

4.text: I challenged myself with my first personal web project!
